status: clean — JUG-MED-10 complete, no active phase

completed_tasks.name: Remove startAfterAt from rowToTask and MCP schema
Replace rigid with placementMode checks across all JS
Drop rigid from tasks_v and tasks_with_sync_v views
Remove preferred_time boolean from rowToTask, taskToRow, and form
Drop preferred_time column from task_masters and rebuild views
Remove stale preferredTime refs from useEffect deps
All-day banner: shared component + all views + timezone date fix
Hide Where/Weather/Tools for all-day tasks in TaskEditForm

decisions.rationale: All t.date === dateKey comparisons use ISO; M/D format caused banner filter to always be empty
DayView + DailyView had duplicate inline logic; WeekView/ThreeDayView had none

decisions.decision: Where/Weather/Tools sections hidden for all-day tasks
decisions.rationale: Location/weather/tools are irrelevant for untimed all-day tasks

next_action: Start JUG-MED-07 (scheduler Mermaid diagrams) or pick from BACKLOG.md
context_notes: JUG-MED-10 shipped in prior session. Root cause was timezone.js returning M/D date format, breaking all banner date-key comparisons. Fixed + all 4 calendar views now have AllDayBanner.
